positive: A stylized, minimalist line art illustration of a celestial landscape featuring crescent moons, constellations, and stylized shooting stars flowing into deep space. The composition should be highly symmetrical, with all elements contained within a central, harmonious frame. Use deep indigo, ethereal gold, and milky white lines on a contrasting dark background. The style should be inspired by Art Deco geometry combined with modern astronomical diagrams, creating clean, recognizable silhouettes suitable for a T-shirt print. Focus on strong negative space and elegant, continuous linework. Graphic design, vector illustration, high contrast, maximal detail.
